title: Fix real-time bookings, inline booking requests, and Book Now button contrast

requirements.summary: Invalidate React Query cache after successful booking to update GuestBookings page in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: After submitting a booking request via BookingRequestModal, the GuestBookings page reflects the new booking without a manual refresh.
The bookings query cache is invalidated or refetched on successful booking mutation.

file_operations.description: After the successful booking mutation in BookingRequestModal, add a call to queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['guestBookings'] }) to force the GuestBookings page to refetch the updated bookings list. This ensures the new booking appears immediately without requiring a manual page refresh.

requirements.summary: Display organizer's incoming booking requests inline within OrganizerDashboard using OrganizerBookingList
acceptanceCriteria: OrganizerDashboard contains a visible section showing the organiser's booking requests inline.
The booking requests section uses OrganizerBookingList or OrganizerBookingCard components.
No navigation to a separate page is required to view booking requests.

file_operations.description: Add a new section within OrganizerDashboard that displays the organizer's incoming booking requests inline. Import and render the OrganizerBookingList component within an expandable or always-visible panel (e.g., using shadcn/ui Collapsible or Card). Fetch the organizer's bookings using the useGetOrganizerBookings hook with the current user's principal. Display the booking requests section after the profile and portfolio sections so users can view and manage requests directly in the dashboard without navigating to a separate page.

requirements.summary: Fix Book Now button text visibility on OrganizerCard by updating text color for sufficient contrast
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Book Now' button text is clearly visible on the OrganizerCard title card.
The button text colour has sufficient contrast against the button background colour (WCAG AA minimum).
The fix is consistent with the navy/gold theme tokens defined in the project.

file_operations.description: Update the Book Now button's text color to ensure sufficient contrast against its background. If the button uses a navy or dark background, set the text color to white or a light gold token. If the button uses a gold or light background, set the text color to navy-900 or navy-950. Ensure the color combination meets WCAG AA contrast requirements (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text) and aligns with the navy/gold theme defined in frontend/tailwind.config.js. Review the current button styling and apply the appropriate Tailwind text color class (e.g., text-white, text-navy-900, or text-gold-50).
